channel.title: BillingWebhookKit Guides
channel.description: Payment webhook testing guides for Lemon Squeezy, signatures, idempotency, cURL replay, contract tests, and CI.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Troubleshooting Hub
item.description: Search-oriented router from Lemon Squeezy webhook failures to the right BillingWebhookKit guide or browser-only tool: Vercel 404, Next.js 405, x-signature invalid, checkout 404, PayPal live checks, and production launch readiness.

item.title: Fix Next.js 405 for Lemon Squeezy Webhooks
item.description: Fix Next.js Method Not Allowed webhook failures with App Router POST exports, Vercel deployed route checks, middleware exclusions, curl smoke tests, raw-body x-signature verification, and duplicate replay safety.

item.title: Fix Lemon Squeezy Webhook 500 on Vercel and Next.js
item.description: Debug Lemon Squeezy webhook 500 errors caused by missing env vars, raw-body x-signature failures, JSON parse crashes, timingSafeEqual length errors, side effects, duplicate replay, and unsafe fulfillment retries.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Retry and Idempotency Guide
item.description: Handle Lemon Squeezy duplicate webhook delivery with order_created idempotency keys, process-once fulfillment, correct 2xx/500 responses, replay tests, and secret-free launch evidence.

item.title: Payment Webhook Test Tool Alternatives
item.description: Compare webhook inboxes, provider CLIs, local fixtures, browser-only generators, CI contract tests, and BillingWebhookKit Pro before a paid checkout launch.

item.title: Vercel Lemon Squeezy Webhook Debugger
item.description: Diagnose Vercel and Next.js Lemon Squeezy webhook launch failures: 404, 405, 500, missing order_created delivery, raw-body x-signature failures, env vars, idempotency, and PR evidence.

item.title: Payment Webhook Test Plan Generator
item.description: Generate a browser-only payment webhook test plan for Lemon Squeezy, Stripe, Paddle, or Polar covering signatures, idempotency, duplicate replay, checkout smoke tests, fulfillment, refunds, and CI.

item.title: Stripe Webhook Test Plan for Next.js
item.description: Build a Next.js Stripe webhook release plan for raw-body signatures, checkout.session.completed fixtures, idempotency, duplicate replay, entitlement decisions, checkout smoke tests, and CI gates.

item.title: Paddle Webhook Test Plan for Next.js
item.description: Build a Next.js Paddle webhook release plan for raw-body Paddle-Signature checks, transaction.completed fixtures, idempotency, duplicate replay, entitlement decisions, checkout smoke tests, and CI gates.

item.title: Next.js Lemon Squeezy Raw Body Audit
item.description: Audit a Next.js App Router Lemon Squeezy webhook route for raw-body x-signature safety, request.json() regressions, runtime choice, idempotency, replay tests, and PR evidence.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Pro Sample Report
item.description: Preview a PR-ready payment webhook review report before buying: signature evidence, duplicate replay checks, entitlement decisions, CI coverage, and CN¥69 Pro Kit fit.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit HTML Sitemap
item.description: A crawlable HTML sitemap linking the BillingWebhookKit buyer path, standalone webhook tools, guide pages, XML sitemap, RSS feed, and llms.txt.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Buyer Checklist
item.description: Pre-purchase checklist for comparing the free tools, free sample, Pro Kit manifest, launch evidence, delivery policy, refund boundaries, and CN¥69 Pro Kit fit.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Pro Fit Checker
item.description: Browser-only fit checker for deciding whether free payment webhook tools are enough or the CN¥69 Pro Kit is reasonable before checkout launch.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Free Sample
item.description: Download a free sample with a Lemon Squeezy fixture, Next.js handler, Vitest signature test, contract test, replay test, and GitHub Actions workflow.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Pro Preview
item.description: Preview the CN¥69 digital pack: payment webhook fixtures, route handlers, tests, CI workflow, idempotency runbook, and launch checklist.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Delivery, Refund, and Support Policy
item.description: Delivery flow, checksum verification, support scope, refund triggers, and safe issue-reporting policy for the CN¥69 Pro Kit.

item.title: BillingWebhookKit Search Console Sitemap Submission
item.description: Exact Google Search Console URL-prefix property, sitemap path, live crawl files, and owner-only submission boundary for BillingWebhookKit.

item.title: Billing Webhook Launch Evidence Pack
item.description: Collect checkout smoke, webhook event coverage, fulfillment proof, refund rollback, delivery email, free sample, and Pro Kit review evidence before a public billing launch.

item.title: Checkout Provider Decision Matrix
item.description: Generate a browser-only Lemon Squeezy vs Stripe vs Paddle vs Polar checkout provider matrix for AI SaaS webhook launch readiness.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy vs Stripe Webhooks for AI SaaS
item.description: Compare Lemon Squeezy and Stripe webhook launch checks for AI SaaS apps across signatures, idempotency, checkout smoke tests, fulfillment, and refunds.

item.title: AI SaaS Billing Webhook Checklist
item.description: A launch checklist for AI-generated and vibe-coded SaaS apps before exposing Lemon Squeezy, Stripe, Paddle, or Polar checkout links.

item.title: Is BillingWebhookKit Worth CN¥69?
item.description: Compare the free browser tools with the CN¥69 Pro Kit, manual payment webhook test setup time, duplicate replay coverage, launch evidence, and break-even math.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Production Webhook Troubleshooting Checklist
item.description: Troubleshoot Lemon Squeezy live checkout webhooks with paid order_created delivery, x-signature verification, duplicate replay, private fulfillment, refund rollback, and release evidence.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Refund Webhook Test
item.description: Test refund webhook rollback, duplicate replay, entitlement revocation, support evidence, and secret-free buyer reports before launch.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Refund Rollback Report Generator
item.description: Generate a browser-only refund rollback report for signed refund webhooks, entitlement revocation, duplicate replay safety, support evidence, and secret-free release review.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy x-signature Verifier
item.description: Check a Lemon Squeezy raw body and received x-signature header locally in the browser.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Payload Generator
item.description: Generate fake Lemon Squeezy webhook payloads, local HMAC signatures, and cURL replay commands.

item.title: Webhook Signature Mismatch Debugger
item.description: Diagnose raw-body mutation, signature header, wrong secret, JSON reserialization, CRLF, and parser mismatch causes.

item.title: Webhook Idempotency Key Generator
item.description: Generate stable payment webhook idempotency keys, SQL constraints, handler guards, and duplicate replay tests.

item.title: Stripe Webhook Fixture Generator
item.description: Generate fake Stripe webhook fixtures, Stripe-Signature headers, cURL replay commands, and contract test notes.

item.title: Webhook Replay cURL Generator
item.description: Generate replayable cURL commands, provider signature headers, and duplicate delivery checks.

item.title: Next.js Webhook Handler Generator
item.description: Generate Next.js App Router payment webhook handlers with raw-body signature verification and idempotency notes.

item.title: Webhook Entitlement Decision Matrix
item.description: Map payment webhook events to access grants, renewals, cancellations, failed-payment holds, and quarantine rules.

item.title: Billing Webhook Debug Cost Calculator
item.description: Estimate avoidable billing webhook debugging cost and compare it with the CNY 69 Pro Kit reference price.

item.title: Billing Webhook Launch Readiness Scorecard
item.description: Score billing webhook launch readiness and export a PR-ready Markdown release report.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy PayPal Live Checkout Report
item.description: Generate a browser-only PayPal live checkout launch report for CN¥69 price visibility, paid webhook delivery, x-signature verification, duplicate replay, private fulfillment, refund rollback, support, and owner approval.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Checkout Smoke Test Report
item.description: Generate a release-ready Lemon Squeezy checkout smoke test report for price, checkout URL, paid webhook delivery, duplicate replay, and fulfillment evidence.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Production Checkout Readiness Report
item.description: Generate a browser-only production checkout readiness report for live key setup, CN¥69 price, PayPal checkout, signed webhooks, duplicate replay, private delivery, refund rollback, and release review.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Fulfillment Checklist Generator
item.description: Generate a browser-only fulfillment checklist report for paid order webhooks, private ZIP delivery, x-signature verification, idempotency, checksum evidence, and support policy links.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Delivery Email Template Generator
item.description: Generate browser-only Lemon Squeezy buyer delivery, resend, and support email templates for private ZIP downloads, checksum evidence, refund policy links, and safe issue reporting.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Event Coverage Matrix
item.description: Generate a browser-only Lemon Squeezy webhook event coverage matrix for order_created, subscriptions, license keys, paid fulfillment, x-signature verification, idempotency, and duplicate replay checks.

item.title: Deliver a Digital Download After Lemon Squeezy Checkout
item.description: Fulfill a private ZIP, license file, or digital product after Lemon Squeezy checkout with signed webhook verification, idempotency, checksum evidence, and duplicate replay safety.

item.title: Test Lemon Squeezy Webhooks Locally
item.description: Generate Lemon Squeezy webhook payloads, HMAC signatures, and curl replay commands without sending secrets to a server.

item.title: Verify Lemon Squeezy Webhook Signatures
item.description: A practical checklist for validating Lemon Squeezy webhook HMAC signatures in SaaS apps.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Test Checklist
item.description: A launch checklist for Lemon Squeezy webhook signature verification, contract fields, idempotency keys, duplicate replay, and entitlement decisions.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Raw Body in Next.js
item.description: Fix Lemon Squeezy webhook signature checks in Next.js by verifying the exact raw request body before JSON parsing.

item.title: Fix Invalid Lemon Squeezy x-signature Errors
item.description: Debug invalid Lemon Squeezy x-signature webhook errors caused by raw-body changes, wrong secrets, header formats, and framework body parsers.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy order_created Webhook Fixture
item.description: Use a Lemon Squeezy order_created webhook fixture to test paid order access grants, customer mapping, and duplicate replay behavior.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Checkout Smoke Test
item.description: Run a Lemon Squeezy checkout smoke test before launch: product price, checkout URL, paid order webhook, duplicate replay, and fulfillment checks.

item.title: Fix Lemon Squeezy Checkout 404 from Custom Price or Currency Mismatch
item.description: Debug Lemon Squeezy checkout 404 errors caused by custom_price minor units, store currency, unpublished variants, and live checkout configuration.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy PayPal Checkout Webhook Test
item.description: Test a Lemon Squeezy PayPal checkout before launch: live checkout page, paid order webhook, signature gate, duplicate replay, and fulfillment evidence.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Production Checkout Go-Live Checklist
item.description: Move from private production checkout testing to a public Lemon Squeezy buy link with live config, CN¥69 pricing, PayPal, signed webhooks, duplicate replay, private delivery, refund rollback, and release evidence.

item.title: Lemon Squeezy Webhook Not Firing After Checkout
item.description: Debug a Lemon Squeezy webhook not firing after checkout: live/test mismatch, endpoint URL, subscribed events, 2xx responses, signature failures, retries, and fulfillment checks.

item.title: Next.js Lemon Squeezy Webhook Handler
item.description: Build a Next.js App Router webhook handler for Lemon Squeezy with raw body signing and event dispatch.

item.title: Hono Lemon Squeezy Webhook Handler
item.description: A Hono webhook route pattern for Lemon Squeezy apps running on Workers or serverless runtimes.

item.description: Use payment webhook fixtures to test checkout.session.completed and invoice.paid flows before launch.

item.description: Verify Stripe webhook signatures in Next.js App Router with raw request bodies, signed fixtures, duplicate replay tests, and CI release gates.

item.description: Generate and organize Paddle webhook test payloads for SaaS billing integration tests.

item.description: Generate repeatable cURL commands for payment webhook development without exposing signing secrets to a hosted service.

item.description: A practical CI checklist for testing payment webhook signatures, fixtures, retries, and idempotency.

item.description: Generate and test Lemon Squeezy license key webhook payloads for desktop apps, plugins, and downloadable products.

item.description: Test subscription_payment_success webhook handling for renewals, entitlement extension, and billing email workflows.

item.description: A compact checklist for making payment webhook handlers safe against retries, duplicated events, and out-of-order delivery.

item.description: A PR-ready checklist for reviewing payment webhook routes before billing changes ship.

item.description: Build a low-cost payment webhook handler on Cloudflare Workers with Web Crypto signature verification.

item.description: A launch checklist for testing SaaS billing webhooks across purchase, subscription, cancellation, refund, and license flows.

item.description: Downloadable and browser-generated Lemon Squeezy webhook fixtures for order, subscription, license, cancellation, and payment success tests.

item.description: Generate payment webhook payloads, signatures, cURL replay commands, and framework handler examples for SaaS billing tests.

item.description: A practical billing webhook starter kit structure for fixtures, raw-body handlers, signature tests, idempotency checks, and CI workflows.
